paras: Tobin Bramblefoot serves Vestacia, the Earthmother, whose blessings sustain life and nurture the wild places. He is no warrior by nature — a halfling more at home in a garden than a battle line — but he believes that protecting others is among the highest callings, and he will plant himself between the helpless and the dark.

Several years ago he worked beside Elowen Raincaller, tending isolated settlements through the long recovery after a devastating flood. He has counted her a friend and an inspiration ever since — her patience with growing things mirrored his own faith.

When word arrives that Elowen has vanished, Tobin does not hesitate. If she is alive, she must be found. If harm has come to her, the truth must be uncovered — and someone must carry Vestacia's mercy into whatever waits south of Thunderford.

items.html: Species: Halfling — Brave, Halfling Nimbleness, Luck, Speed 30
Ability scores: Str 13, Dex 12, Con 14, Int 8, Wis 15, Cha 10 (standard array; background +2 Wis / +1 Con)
Spellcasting — Wisdom; prepares from the whole cleric list; 2 first-level slots
Background: Acolyte — Origin feat Magic Initiate (Cleric); skills Insight & Religion; Calligrapher's Supplies; +2 Wis / +1 Con
Channel Divinity — Divine Spark & Turn Undead (2 uses)
Domain spells (always prepared): Bless, Cure Wounds, Aid, Lesser Restoration
Disciple of Life; Preserve Life (Channel Divinity); spells → 3 first-level + 2 second-level slots
Took the ASI rather than a feat

combat.note: Your turn: Move up to your Speed, take one Action, and one Bonus Action. You also get one , used when its trigger happens (often on someone else's turn) — like a foe leaving your .

grantsPool.label: Channel Divinity
grantsPool.reminder: Channel Divinity: Divine Spark, Turn Undead, or Preserve Life.

grantsPool.label: Hit Dice
grantsPool.reminder: Hit Die: roll 1d8+2, then add it with Heal.

stat_init.title: Initiative
body: Initiative equals your Dexterity modifier (+1).

stat_speed.title: Speed
body: Your walking speed is 30 feet. Heavy armor doesn't slow you — your Strength (13) meets the chain mail requirement.

stat_prof.title: Proficiency Bonus
body: +2 at levels 1–4. Added to attack rolls, saves and skills you're proficient with, your spell save DC, and your spell attack.

stat_pass.title: Passive Perception
body: Passive Perception = 10 + your Perception modifier. You aren't proficient in Perception, so it's just Wisdom +4 → 14.

asi.title: Level 4 — Ability Score Improvement
body: You raised Wisdom from 17 to 19 (+4). That improved your spell save DC, spell attack, healing, Wisdom saves, and Insight/Medicine/Perception.

lifedomain.title: Life Domain
body: Vestacia's domain of life and renewal. You always have Bless, Cure Wounds, Aid, and Lesser Restoration prepared, gain the Preserve Life Channel Divinity option, and your healing spells restore extra hit points (Disciple of Life).

discipleoflife.title: Disciple of Life
body: Whenever you restore hit points to a creature with a level 1+ spell, on the turn you cast it the creature regains additional hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

channeldivinity.title: Channel Divinity
body: A Magic action fueling one of your divine options: Divine Spark, Turn Undead, or Preserve Life. You have two uses; regain one on a short rest and all on a long rest.
Tap Use to spend a use, then resolve the chosen option below.

divinespark.title: Divine Spark
body: Point your holy symbol at a creature within 30 ft and roll 1d8 + Wis. Either heal it that much, or force a Constitution save for Radiant or Necrotic damage (half on a success). Costs a Channel Divinity use.

turnundead.title: Turn Undead
body: Each Undead of your choice within 30 ft makes a Wisdom save or is Frightened and Incapacitated for 1 minute, fleeing from you. Costs a Channel Divinity use.

preservelife.title: Preserve Life
body: Restore hit points equal to five times your cleric level (20 at level 4), divided among Bloodied creatures within 30 ft (can include you). It can't raise a creature above half its hit point maximum. Costs a Channel Divinity use.

divineorder.title: Divine Order: Protector
body: You trained as a warrior-priest: you gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor — which is why you can wear chain mail and swing a warhammer.

magicinitiate.title: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
body: From the Cleric list you learn two cantrips (Light and Resistance) and one level-1 spell (Healing Word), cast with Wisdom. You can cast Healing Word once per long rest without a slot, and also with your slots. Granted by the Acolyte background.

acolyte.title: Background: Acolyte
body: A life of temple service. Acolyte grants the Magic Initiate (Cleric) Origin feat, proficiency in Insight and Religion, Calligrapher's Supplies, and the +2 Wisdom / +1 Constitution that shaped your scores.

brave.title: Halfling: Brave
body: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

luck.title: Halfling: Luck
body: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test (an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw), you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

nimbleness.title: Halfling: Nimbleness
body: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, though it isn't difficult terrain for you.

spellslots1.title: Spell Slots (Level 1)
body: Four 1st-level slots, regained on a long rest. Spell save DC 14 (8 + Wis +4 + prof +2); spell attack +6. Tap Use to spend a slot.

spellslots2.title: Spell Slots (Level 2)
body: Three 2nd-level slots, regained on a long rest. Casting at 2nd level uses one. Tap Use to spend a slot.

hitdice.title: Hit Dice
body: On a short rest you can spend Hit Dice to heal, rolling 1d8+2 each (1d8 + Constitution modifier). Regain spent Hit Dice on a long rest.

sacredflame.title: Sacred Flame
body: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature within 60 ft: Dexterity save (DC 14) or 1d8 radiant. The target gains no benefit from cover. The die grows at higher levels.

guidance.title: Guidance
body: Touch a willing creature; once before the spell ends it adds 1d4 to one ability check. Requires Concentration.

sparethedying.title: Spare the Dying
body: Stabilize a creature that has 0 hit points within 30 ft without needing an action to make death saves.

tollthedead.title: Toll the Dead
body: A target makes a Wisdom save or takes 1d8 necrotic — 1d12 if it's already missing hit points.

light.title: Light
body: An object sheds Bright Light (20 ft) and Dim Light (another 20 ft) for 1 hour. From Magic Initiate.

resistance.title: Resistance
body: Touch a willing creature; once before the spell ends it adds 1d4 to one saving throw. Concentration. From Magic Initiate.

healingword.title: Healing Word
body: As a Bonus Action, a creature within 60 ft regains 2d4 + your Wisdom modifier hit points (plus Disciple of Life). From Magic Initiate you can cast it free once per long rest, or with a slot. Tap Use to spend the free cast.

bless.title: Bless
body: Up to three creatures add 1d4 to their attack rolls and saving throws for the duration. Concentration, up to 1 minute. Always prepared (Life Domain).

curewounds.title: Cure Wounds
body: Touch a creature to restore 2d8 + Wisdom hit points (plus Disciple of Life: +3 at 1st level). No effect on Undead or Constructs. Always prepared (Life Domain).

aid.title: Aid
body: Up to three creatures each gain +5 to their hit point maximum and current hit points for 8 hours (more at higher levels). Always prepared (Life Domain).

lesserrestoration.title: Lesser Restoration
body: End one disease or the Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, or Poisoned condition on a creature you touch. Always prepared (Life Domain).

guidingbolt.title: Guiding Bolt
body: A ranged spell attack (+6); on a hit, 4d6 radiant and the next attack roll against the target before the end of your next turn has Advantage.

shieldoffaith.title: Shield of Faith
body: As a Bonus Action, a creature within 60 ft gains +2 AC for the duration. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

sanctuary.title: Sanctuary
body: Ward a creature within 30 ft; until the spell ends, anyone targeting it with an attack or harmful spell must first pass a Wisdom save or choose a new target. Ends if the warded creature attacks or casts a harmful spell.

spiritualweapon.title: Spiritual Weapon
body: Create a floating spectral weapon for 1 minute. On casting and as a Bonus Action each turn, move it 20 ft and make a melee spell attack (+6) for 1d8 + Wis force. No Concentration in the 2024 rules.

prayerofhealing.title: Prayer of Healing
body: Up to five creatures you can see regain 2d8 + your Wisdom modifier hit points (plus Disciple of Life). A 10-minute casting — out of combat healing.

holdperson.title: Hold Person
body: A humanoid makes a Wisdom save or is Paralyzed for the duration, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns. Concentration, up to 1 minute.

detectmagic.title: Detect Magic
body: Sense magic within 30 ft for the duration; as an action, see a visible magical thing's aura and learn its school.

silence.title: Silence
body: No sound can be created within or pass through a 20-ft-radius sphere for the duration — blocks verbal spellcasting and thunder damage. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

mace.title: Mace
body: A simple bludgeon, +3 to hit (Str +1, proficiency +2), 1d6+1. Your spells do the heavy lifting.

warhammer.title: Warhammer
body: A martial weapon you can use thanks to Divine Order: Protector. Two-handed it deals 1d10+1.
